response.justification: Bogdan brings over 20 years of broad technical experience and a genuine background in developer tooling (testing frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, MCP code generators), which partially satisfies the technical side of this role. However, the job description explicitly requires a people-leadership role with 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership — neither of which appears anywhere in this resume. Every position listed is an individual contributor role; 'Staff' titles here reflect technical seniority, not organizational scope. Without any evidence of managing direct reports, running performance cycles, or leading a team, this candidate does not meet the minimum bar for a Level II Engineering Manager.
strengths: Deep and varied developer tooling background including testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), CI/CD infrastructure, and MCP code generators
Strong TDD and software craftsmanship advocacy demonstrated consistently across multiple roles
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing and mentorship culture via workshops, conference talks, and in-office code katas
concerns: Zero people management experience — no direct reports, performance reviews, or team hiring mentioned across 20+ years of employment history
All roles are individual contributor positions; 'Staff' titles reflect technical seniority rather than organizational or managerial leadership
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership, cross-team alignment, or leading organizational change at any scale

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
No technical leadership or org-level scope
